## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content performance, SEO progress, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/vxyRzBXEyoF7N4Ly_woXmbH9YDDMYshs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant SEO improvements: 600% keyword growth, 77% non-branded traffic (up from 32%), 20 keywords in top 3 positions](https://fathom.video/share/vxyRzBXEyoF7N4Ly_woXmbH9YDDMYshs?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Organic backlinks from reputable dental sources improving domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/vxyRzBXEyoF7N4Ly_woXmbH9YDDMYshs?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Content strategy success with AI and insurance-related topics; need for long-term planning](https://fathom.video/share/vxyRzBXEyoF7N4Ly_woXmbH9YDDMYshs?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Teero considering contract renewal with GrowthX; negotiating pricing and contract length](https://fathom.video/share/vxyRzBXEyoF7N4Ly_woXmbH9YDDMYshs?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Week 19: Slight performance increase; clear month-over-month growth](https://fathom.video/share/vxyRzBXEyoF7N4Ly_woXmbH9YDDMYshs?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [SEMrush report highlights (Dec-Feb vs. last 3 months):](https://fathom.video/share/vxyRzBXEyoF7N4Ly_woXmbH9YDDMYshs?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [Substantial backlink growth (many low-quality, some high-value)](https://fathom.video/share/vxyRzBXEyoF7N4Ly_woXmbH9YDDMYshs?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [600%+ keyword growth](https://fathom.video/share/vxyRzBXEyoF7N4Ly_woXmbH9YDDMYshs?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [Non-branded traffic increased from 32% to 77%](https://fathom.video/share/vxyRzBXEyoF7N4Ly_woXmbH9YDDMYshs?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [20 keywords in top 3 positions (17 new in last 3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/vxyRzBXEyoF7N4Ly_woXmbH9YDDMYshs?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
      - [\~100 keywords in top 10 positions](https://fathom.video/share/vxyRzBXEyoF7N4Ly_woXmbH9YDDMYshs?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

### Featured Snippets and AI Overviews

  - [Teero has 3 featured snippets:](https://fathom.video/share/vxyRzBXEyoF7N4Ly_woXmbH9YDDMYshs?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
    1.  "Premium dental tools with AI technology"
    2.  "What are dental assistants not allowed to do?"
    3.  "Do dental hygienists get benefits?"
